title: arenaria iberica
intro: Arenaria iberica, also known as Iberian sandwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria iberica include its potential to treat various ailments such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Arenaria iberica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
